_meta.description: Prompts cinématiques par ville pour la génération d'images via Higgsfield (gpt_image_2 ou z_image). Chaque prompt met en avant la spécificité de la ville (paysage, artisanat, culture, faune). Format National Geographic, golden hour, 16:9.
_meta.negative: no text, no watermark, no logo, no people facing camera

prompts.Ambalavao: Cinematic wide-angle photograph of Ambalavao, Madagascar at golden hour. Artisans crafting traditional Antemoro paper with embedded dried flowers in an open workshop, sun-bleached brick houses in the background, rolling hills of the southern highlands beyond. Two zebus walking along a dusty earth road in the middle ground. Warm ochre and terracotta tones, soft amber light, deep shadows. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 35mm lens, f/4, sharp focus on the paper-making frame, shallow depth of field. National Geographic documentary style, photorealistic, ultra-detailed textures, 4K. No text, no watermark, no people facing camera.
prompts.Ambanja: Cinematic wide-angle photograph of Ambanja, Madagascar at golden hour. Lush green cacao plantation rows under tall shade trees, cacao pods ripening on tree trunks in the foreground, a worker silhouette walking between rows carrying a woven basket, distant rolling hills of the Sambirano valley. Volumetric god rays piercing the canopy, warm emerald and amber tones. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 35mm, f/2.8, sharp focus on cacao pods, shallow depth of field. National Geographic documentary style, photorealistic, ultra-detailed, 4K. No text, no watermark, no people facing camera.
prompts.Ambato Boeny: Cinematic wide-angle photograph of Ambato Boeny, Madagascar at golden hour. Dry savanna landscape of the western Boeny region with scattered satrana palms and red lateritic soil, the Betsiboka river bending in the background, a herd of humped zebus crossing the plain in distant silhouette. Warm amber and rust tones, soft dust haze. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 35mm, f/4, shallow depth of field. National Geographic style, photorealistic, ultra-detailed, 4K. No text, no watermark, no people facing camera.
prompts.Ambatofinandrahana: Cinematic wide-angle photograph of Ambatofinandrahana, Madagascar at golden hour. White and pink marble quarries carved into highland mountains, blocks of raw stone in the foreground, artisans polishing marble in distant silhouette, the misty Itremo massif in the background. Soft golden light, cool blue shadows on stone, warm amber highlights. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 35mm, f/4, ultra-detailed marble veining. National Geographic documentary style, photorealistic, 4K. No text, no watermark, no people facing camera.
prompts.Ambatolampy: Cinematic wide-angle photograph of Ambatolampy, Madagascar at golden hour. Traditional aluminum foundry workshop, artisans pouring molten silver metal into hand-carved sand moulds to make casseroles, glowing orange light from molten aluminum, rows of finished cooking pots stacked along earthen walls. Warm fire-orange light contrasting deep blue twilight outside. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 50mm, f/2.8, sharp focus on the molten pour, shallow depth of field. National Geographic documentary style, photorealistic, ultra-detailed, 4K. No text, no watermark, no people facing camera.

Vast emerald rice paddies of the Alaotra basin stretching to the horizon, farmers in straw hats wading through reflective water in distant silhouette, the largest lake of Madagascar gleaming in the background, mist rising. Mirror-like reflections of the warm orange sky. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 35mm, f/4, sharp focus on the rice paddy reflections, shallow depth of field. National Geographic documentary style, photorealistic, 4K. No text, no watermark, no people facing camera.
